key_findings.1_pestis_plasmidome: 99.6% Y. pestis carry plasmids (pFra/pPla/pCD1 positive control)

2_animal_niche_highest_burden.interpretation: Animal reservoirs = primary plasmid pool; 3× more plasmid DNA than clinical

3_IncFII_dominance.interpretation: Shared backbone with E. coli clinical plasmids — inter-species transfer potential

4_novel_species_minimal_plasmids.interpretation: Cryosphere isolates acquire minimal plasmids; AMR likely chromosomal

5_environmental_paradox.interpretation: Plasmid-poor but AMR-rich = cryptic chromosomal mobilome = Paper 1 title
